sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24234" key="deuta/tios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτάτιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεύτατος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:350" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">350</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
